# Grifo

> Grifo turns any PDF into an interactive practice worksheet directly in the browser — add fields over the page, fill them in, and export the completed PDF. No upload, no account.

Grifo is a browser-based PDF editor focused on study practice. Users drop a PDF, place inputs/checkboxes/date/number fields and rich notes over the rendered page, then export a flattened PDF or PNG. All processing happens locally in the browser.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page explaining how Grifo turns PDFs into interactive practice.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Study dashboard with continue-where-you-left-off, recommended practices, streak and stats.
- [Editor](/tool): Interactive PDF editor — load a PDF, draw fields, take notes, export.
